creator: rometravelers
caption:
Golden hour hits the Colosseum like no filter ever could by @iampcast 🌅🏛️ Tag your favorite traveling partner! ❤️

💡As the sun sets, the Colosseum’s ancient stones glow amber, creating the perfect blend of history and romance. Evening tours reveal the monument in a softer, less crowded light.

transcription.text: I'm in a bad girl good mood wearing my gold hoops Lining my lips right now in the rear view Baby, don't even play When you look at me like that In your cowboy hat talking like a real man
